summary: Comprehensive backend testing of AI Music Video Studio. All 23 tests passed (100%). Covered: root health, settings CRUD + test endpoints (suno/mj/ffmpeg), project CRUD, user-shaped lyrics import (with bracket annotations parsed into 4 sections w/ image_prompt), song music gen mock, analyze creates monotonic indexed sections w/ mood+effects, section update, single + batch image generation (4 picsum variants), 16 effects presets, video compose -> video_ready, channels CRUD, OAuth start (returns google URL when client_id set), OAuth complete (rejects missing refresh_token), uploads create/list/publish/publish-all (status -> published with yt_ id), jobs reverse-chrono ordering, retry increments attempts, delete -> 404, and global _id exclusion validated on every response.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~570 lines — borderline; consider splitting routes by domain (settings/projects/songs/channels/uploads/jobs) before adding real Suno/MJ/YouTube integrations.
BackgroundTasks based job runner is fine for mocks but will not survive process restart; persist 'queued' jobs and pick up on startup before real integrations land.
POST /api/uploads accepts raw Dict with no Pydantic validation — recommend an UploadCreate model for type safety (privacy enum, tags list[str]).
PUT /api/projects/{pid} and /api/sections/{secid} accept raw Dict; add Pydantic update models to reject unknown fields and enforce types.
DELETE /api/projects does not also delete sections of orphaned songs in a single batch query (currently does per-song loop) — minor N+1.
oauth-start returns 200 with empty url + error string when client_id missing; consider 400 for clearer client handling.
No auth/authorization on any endpoint — fine for desktop wrapper but should be flagged before public deployment.
MOOD_KEYWORDS lookup uses substring match on dict keys; works but order-dependent (dict iteration). Acceptable but document.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_ prefixed project/channel/uploads; project teardown cascades song+section deletion. No persistent pollution beyond uploads (no module fixture teardown for uploads collection).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers full pipeline end-to-end with the user's exact lyrics JSON shape (title/language/styles/lyrics/annotations w/ [bracket prompts]/image_styles). Jobs take ~3s; tests poll up to 10s. Frontend not tested this iteration. Suno/MJ/FFmpeg/YouTube remain MOCKED — real integrations deferred.
